# NuDS Icon Catalog

Searchable catalog of all registered icons in `@nu-design-org/nuds-vibecode-react-native`.
Use this file to match Figma layer names to existing NuDS icon components.

**How to use**: Search by component name, description keywords, or Figma aliases.

---

## Navigation & Arrows

| Component | Description | Figma aliases |
|---|---|---|
| `ArrowBackIcon` | Left-pointing arrow (back navigation) | arrow-back, back, navigate-back, ic-back |
| `ArrowDownIcon` | Downward arrow | arrow-down, down-arrow |
| `ArrowLeftIcon` | Left-pointing arrow | arrow-left, left-arrow |
| `ArrowRightIcon` | Right-pointing arrow | arrow-right, right-arrow, forward |
| `ArrowUpIcon` | Upward arrow | arrow-up, up-arrow |
| `ArrowUpRightIcon` | Diagonal up-right arrow (external link) | arrow-up-right, external, open-in-new |
| `ArrowsTowardsEachOtherIcon` | Two arrows pointing inward | arrows-collapse, merge |
| `ArrowsUpDownFilledIcon` | Up/down arrows (filled) | sort-filled, arrows-vertical-filled |
| `ArrowsUpDownIcon` | Up/down arrows | sort-arrows, arrows-vertical, up-down |
| `ChevronDownIcon` | Chevron pointing down | chevron-down, expand, dropdown-arrow |
| `ChevronIcon` | Generic chevron | chevron |
| `ChevronLeftIcon` | Chevron pointing left | chevron-left, back-chevron |
| `ChevronRightIcon` | Chevron pointing right | chevron-right, forward-chevron, navigate-next |
| `DoubleArrowCollapsedIcon` | Double chevron collapsed | double-arrow-collapsed, collapse |
| `DoubleArrowIcon` | Double chevron expanded | double-arrow, expand-all |
| `ExpandLessIcon` | Upward chevron (collapse) | expand-less, collapse, chevron-up |
| `ExpandMoreIcon` | Downward chevron (expand) | expand-more, expand, dropdown |
| `SortIcon` | Sort indicator | sort, order, reorder |
| `SwapIcon` | Horizontal swap arrows | swap, exchange-horizontal |
| `SwapVerticalIcon` | Vertical swap arrows | swap-vertical, exchange-vertical |
| `UnfoldLessIcon` | Collapse vertically | unfold-less, collapse-vertical |
| `UnfoldMoreIcon` | Expand vertically | unfold-more, expand-vertical |

| Component | Description | Figma aliases |
|---|---|---|
| `RadioButton` | Radio button control (not a standard icon — uses `RadioButtonProps` with `selected`, not `IconProps`) | radio, radio-button, option |

---

## Notes

- All icons (except `RadioButton`) use `IconProps`: `{ size?: number; color?: string; opacity?: number }`
- Default `size` is `20`; default `color` is `theme.color.content.primary`
- Icons are imported from `@nu-design-org/nuds-vibecode-react-native`
- When no match is found, use `PlaceholderIcon` and leave a TODO comment
